args: "const mysql = require('mysql2/promise'); const pool = mysql.createPool({ host: process.env.SRUSUN_MYSQL_HOST, user: process.env.SRUSUN_MYSQL_USER, password: process.env.SRUSUN_MYSQL_PASSWORD, database: process.env.SRUSUN_MYSQL_DATABASE }); pool.query('SHOW COLUMNS FROM rentals').then(([rows]) => console.log(rows)).catch(console.error).finally(()=>process.exit(0));"
